response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js/React and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure development (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks), which is a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test libraries, testing workshops) and cloud/container experience align well with the role. Main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin specifically, and a career history weighted toward niche technologies (DLang) rather than the exact primary stack, but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Direct experience with AI agent development and MCP tooling, a required and uncommon skill
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple product companies
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored testing frameworks, taught courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework
No Kotlin exposure; Java experience appears dated (robotics work in 2016-2018)
Significant investment in niche ecosystems (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the listed stack (React, Vitest, Playwright)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
